heading: Omitted
label: 695 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which related to transfer of tribal property by the Secretary of the Interior to a corporation or other legal entity organized by the tribe, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Aug. 13, 1954, ch. 733, § 568 Stat. 725
